### Post by miesnerd on 2009-05-21
I've tried and tried to get this thing working, something is wrong with the configuration of the second screen. Its probably an easy fix, but I cant figure it out.  Everything with the right screen (the Viewsonic screen is fine. The left screen (X2gen) is whats messed up. Doesnt even turn on, and I am 100% positive this monitor works with this computer.

```
# nvidia-settings: X configuration file generated by nvidia-settings
# nvidia-settings:  version 1.0  (buildmeister@builder58)  Fri Apr 17 00:40:57 PDT 2009

    Identifier     "Layout0"
    Screen      0  "Screen0" 0 0
    InputDevice    "Keyboard0" "CoreKeyboard"
```
